summary: ISS-1533 (decider blocked-items scanner reads append-only EXP metadata, source-of-truth-drift from HNOTE-DECIDER-PHASE-A-STATUS-HALLUCINATION-001) is empirically not manifesting. Mechanical scan of 126 daily-report-*.json files since ISS-1533 was filed 2026-04-25: zero occurrences of the false-flag string DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW, zero occurrences of the blocked_expansions[] key. The 11 EXP files on disk that still carry frozen integration_blocked_until metadata (EXP-190, 202, 207-213, 285, 211-redesign variants) are all out of the live expansion-tracker.json (tracker pruned post-integration to 60 items). Bug is dormant for 22 consecutive days. Recommend close with defensive-audit deferred to tinker — file a follow-up infrastructure ISS (severity=minor, class=infrastructure-defensive, route=assigned-tinker) for the sanity-check patch from HNOTE step 3 (suppress blocked_items entries where tracker shows integrated:true). The original HNOTE marked this as backlog/not-urgent; 22 days of clean output justifies closing it now and tracking the defensive structural fix separately. Pinned SHA 68a36eb1.
override_note: review_class OVERRIDDEN from baby-escalated deep-attack to verification per PROP-025 author honesty — empirical absence-of-recurrence check is mechanical (grep two strings across 126 JSONs), no scientific argumentation, no new arguments introduced. Original baby orphan-pickup escalation 2026-05-14T13:39Z classified as deep-attack but EXP scope is verification-tier. See EXP-412.class_hint_honored field for full rationale.
